TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qalang_Uley, title = qalang_Uley, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qalang_Uley} }

S.FORM: == qalang Uley == cyux te inu' qu qalang maki' cyah pira' qalang na Tayal sa Nantoukeng Ringaygo qani hiya'. pwah su' tuqi ka son myan te mspat pgan qeru' lga, cyux qalang Mstbon, qalang Kobah, qalang Ba'i, qalang Mkna'i, qalang Uley, qalang Marepa, qalang Mlikwang, ru qalang Bubun. qalang Uley cyux bih squ qalang Mkna'i. kahul su' qalang Mkna'i musa' su' qalang uley ga, hminas qutux hongu' ru maki' qutux hopa bale na btunux cyux kya. qasa ga qes ni qalang uley ki qalang Mkna'i. sinllwan lalu' qalang knayal bnkis sraral mha, "ki'an uley qsya' ppman bih ta' qani, si ta' se qalang Uley lma,". bale bale qu ke' na kinbkisan ta', nanu' ana qalang Marepa, qalang Mkna'i, ru qalang Ba'i ye muci kmal ma, yasa qa son myan qalang Uley lga. baha hmswa' nanak qani cyux uley, qani ga sinllwan lalu' qalang. pinqzyuwan qalang minkahul qalang Muya sraral. nxan ga, mnaki' qalang Marepa. ana ga, khmey iyal qu squliq nyux sqani lma. nanu' yasa qu tnrang Gipun hasa ga, wal mb_yaq squ qalang Uley la. maki' qutux ke' ka cyux muci kmayal mha ma, "baha hmswa' m'uy balay mlahang topa qalang muci." tayal ka nyux qalang Rahaw misuw qaniy ini' khmey qu tayal ka cyux maki' sqani. nanak mopuw ngasal msya nyux sqani. iwey bbnkis ru lelaqi' cyux qalang, gi wayal mtiwa te hugal qu yaba' ru yaya' nqu lelaqi' qani hiya'. krryax ga, ini' tehuk mpusal squliq maki' qalang. snhyan maki' cyoro kyokay misuw qani. nxan ga mnaki' tesikyo, ana ga wal mhuqil qu bbnkis ka son myan sinxu' lga, uka' la moni. nanak cyoro kyokay maki' na'. qqyanux mnuhi' tqinuw te qmayah nha' qu qutux qutux ngasal nha' sraral. ini' ga, mnuhi' cyah qitun, qabang, ru sukey lepa bih syaw na tuqi. mwah mba'y kora' qani qu ssquliq ka mwah mcisal sqani. moni hiya' lga, muya' cikah tmana ru tbihi'. maki' traku' ka ssatu' nha' tbihi' pinmuhi' nqu tayal te hugal qu ssquliq squ yung son myan. tuqiy mnaki' basu' nxan. ana ga, kin_yaqih balay qu tuqi hiya' la. nyal behuy, ini' ga topa qolax lga, msluhi qu rrgyax. Si ktey iwey mhiriq qu basu' qani ma, nanu' ini' tehuk qutux byacing lga, uka' basu' myan la. wahan tbasaw mzwi baqun myan cyux uley te qalang Uley qani hiya'. aring Gipun lga maki' balay squ lalu' nya' la. pira' kawas wayal, ana wal hmor topa qsya', ulung maki' mmrhuw ru sexu' myan ka klokah smsung ru kbaley giqas na ppman ta'. yasa qa thuye sami mwah tbu' uley la'i. nanu' tmrang ryax hngawan ga, khmey na squliq mwah tbu' uley. kruma' squliq hiya' ga, memaw maras qeqaya' nha' mwah phapuy ru m'abi' ska' turuy bih syaw na uley qani. pslyan lahuy na gaga ki pslokah hi uka' pslyan lahuy na gaga ki pslokah hi' nha', giway muha' qalang Mkna'i msqun mcisal, ini' ga msqun mqbaq ana nanu'.

== qalang Uley == cyux te inu' qu qalang maki' cyah pira' qalang na Tayal sa Nantoukeng Ringaygo qani hiya'. pwah su' tuqi ka son myan te mspat pgan qeru' lga, cyux qalang Mstbon, qalang Kobah, qalang Ba'i, qalang Mkna'i, qalang Uley, qalang Marepa, qalang Mlikwang, ru qalang Bubun. qalang Uley cyux bih squ qalang Mkna'i. kahul su' qalang Mkna'i musa' su' qalang uley ga, hminas qutux hongu' ru maki' qutux hopa bale na btunux cyux kya. qasa ga qes ni qalang uley ki qalang Mkna'i. sinllwan lalu' qalang knayal bnkis sraral mha, "ki'an uley qsya' ppman bih ta' qani, si ta' se qalang Uley lma,". bale bale qu ke' na kinbkisan ta', nanu' ana qalang Marepa, qalang Mkna'i, ru qalang Ba'i ye muci kmal ma, yasa qa son myan qalang Uley lga. baha hmswa' nanak qani cyux uley, qani ga sinllwan lalu' qalang. pinqzyuwan qalang minkahul qalang Muya sraral. nxan ga, mnaki' qalang Marepa. ana ga, khmey iyal qu squliq nyux sqani lma. nanu' yasa qu tnrang Gipun hasa ga, wal mb_yaq squ qalang Uley la. maki' qutux ke' ka cyux muci kmayal mha ma, "baha hmswa' m'uy balay mlahang topa qalang muci." tayal ka nyux qalang Rahaw misuw qaniy ini' khmey qu tayal ka cyux maki' sqani. nanak mopuw ngasal msya nyux sqani. iwey bbnkis ru lelaqi' cyux qalang, gi wayal mtiwa te hugal qu yaba' ru yaya' nqu lelaqi' qani hiya'. krryax ga, ini' tehuk mpusal squliq maki' qalang. snhyan maki' cyoro kyokay misuw qani. nxan ga mnaki' tesikyo, ana ga wal mhuqil qu bbnkis ka son myan sinxu' lga, uka' la moni. nanak cyoro kyokay maki' na'. qqyanux mnuhi' tqinuw te qmayah nha' qu qutux qutux ngasal nha' sraral. ini' ga, mnuhi' cyah qitun, qabang, ru sukey lepa bih syaw na tuqi. mwah mba'y kora' qani qu ssquliq ka mwah mcisal sqani. moni hiya' lga, muya' cikah tmana ru tbihi'. maki' traku' ka ssatu' nha' tbihi' pinmuhi' nqu tayal te hugal qu ssquliq squ yung son myan. tuqiy mnaki' basu' nxan. ana ga, kin_yaqih balay qu tuqi hiya' la. nyal behuy, ini' ga topa qolax lga, msluhi qu rrgyax. Si ktey iwey mhiriq qu basu' qani ma, nanu' ini' tehuk qutux byacing lga, uka' basu' myan la. wahan tbasaw mzwi baqun myan cyux uley te qalang Uley qani hiya'. aring Gipun lga maki' balay squ lalu' nya' la. pira' kawas wayal, ana wal hmor topa qsya', ulung maki' mmrhuw ru sexu' myan ka klokah smsung ru kbaley giqas na ppman ta'. yasa qa thuye sami mwah tbu' uley la'i. nanu' tmrang ryax hngawan ga, khmey na squliq mwah tbu' uley. kruma' squliq hiya' ga, memaw maras qeqaya' nha' mwah phapuy ru m'abi' ska' turuy bih syaw na uley qani. pslyan lahuy na gaga ki pslokah hi uka' pslyan lahuy na gaga ki pslokah hi' nha', giway muha' qalang Mkna'i msqun mcisal, ini' ga msqun mqbaq ana nanu'.
S.PHON: == qalaŋ ulej == ʦ~ʨjux te inuʔ qu qalaŋ makiʔ ʦ~ʨjaħ piraʔ qalaŋ na tajal s~ɕa nantoukeŋ riŋajɣo qani ħijaʔ. pwaħ s~ɕuʔ tuqi ka s~ɕon mjan te ms~ɕpat pɣan qeruʔ lɣa, ʦ~ʨjux qalaŋ ms~ɕtβon, qalaŋ koβaħ, qalaŋ βaʔi, qalaŋ mknaʔi, qalaŋ ulej, qalaŋ marepa, qalaŋ mlikwaŋ, ru qalaŋ βuβun. qalaŋ ulej ʦ~ʨjux βiħ s~ɕqu qalaŋ mknaʔi. kaħul s~ɕuʔ qalaŋ mknaʔi mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕuʔ qalaŋ ulej ɣa, ħminas~ɕ qutux ħoŋuʔ ru makiʔ qutux ħopa βale na βtunux ʦ~ʨjux kja. qas~ɕa ɣa qes~ɕ ni qalaŋ ulej ki qalaŋ mknaʔi. s~ɕinllwan laluʔ qalaŋ knajal βnkis~ɕ s~ɕraral mħa, "kiʔan ulej qs~ɕjaʔ ppman βiħ taʔ qani, s~ɕi taʔ s~ɕe qalaŋ ulej lma,". βale βale qu keʔ na kinβkis~ɕan taʔ, nanuʔ ana qalaŋ marepa, qalaŋ mknaʔi, ru qalaŋ βaʔi je muʦ~ʨi kmal ma, jas~ɕa qa s~ɕon mjan qalaŋ ulej lɣa. βaħa ħms~ɕwaʔ nanak qani ʦ~ʨjux ulej, qani ɣa s~ɕinllwan laluʔ qalaŋ. pinqzjuwan qalaŋ minkaħul qalaŋ muja s~ɕraral. nxan ɣa, mnakiʔ qalaŋ marepa. ana ɣa, kħmej ijal qu s~ɕquliq njux s~ɕqani lma. nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu tnraŋ ɣipun ħas~ɕa ɣa, wal mβəjaq s~ɕqu qalaŋ ulej la. makiʔ qutux keʔ ka ʦ~ʨjux muʦ~ʨi kmajal mħa ma, "βaħa ħms~ɕwaʔ mʔuj βalaj mlaħaŋ topa qalaŋ muʦ~ʨi." tajal ka njux qalaŋ raħaw mis~ɕuw qanij iniʔ kħmej qu tajal ka ʦ~ʨjux makiʔ s~ɕqani. nanak mopuw ŋas~ɕal ms~ɕja njux s~ɕqani. iwej ββnkis~ɕ ru lelaqiʔ ʦ~ʨjux qalaŋ, ɣi wajal mtiwa te ħuɣal qu jaβaʔ ru jajaʔ nqu lelaqiʔ qani ħijaʔ. krrjax ɣa, iniʔ teħuk mpus~ɕal s~ɕquliq makiʔ qalaŋ. s~ɕnħjan makiʔ ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj mis~ɕuw qani. nxan ɣa mnakiʔ tes~ɕikjo, ana ɣa wal mħuqil qu ββnkis~ɕ ka s~ɕon mjan s~ɕinxuʔ lɣa, ukaʔ la moni. nanak ʦ~ʨjoro kjokaj makiʔ naʔ. qqjanux mnuħiʔ tqinuw te qmajaħ nħaʔ qu qutux qutux ŋas~ɕal nħaʔ s~ɕraral. iniʔ ɣa, mnuħiʔ ʦ~ʨjaħ qitun, qaβaŋ, ru s~ɕukej lepa βiħ s~ɕjaw na tuqi. mwaħ mβaʔj koraʔ qani qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq ka mwaħ mʦ~ʨis~ɕal s~ɕqani. moni ħijaʔ lɣa, mujaʔ ʦ~ʨikaħ tmana ru tβiħiʔ. makiʔ trakuʔ ka s~ɕs~ɕatuʔ nħaʔ tβiħiʔ pinmuħiʔ nqu tajal te ħuɣal qu s~ɕs~ɕquliq s~ɕqu juŋ s~ɕon mjan. tuqij mnakiʔ βas~ɕuʔ nxan. ana ɣa, kinəjaqiħ βalaj qu tuqi ħijaʔ la. njal βeħuj, iniʔ ɣa topa qolax lɣa, ms~ɕluħi qu rrɣjax. s~ɕi ktej iwej mħiriq qu βas~ɕuʔ qani ma, nanuʔ iniʔ teħuk qutux βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, ukaʔ βas~ɕuʔ mjan la. waħan tβas~ɕaw mzwi βaqun mjan ʦ~ʨjux ulej te qalaŋ ulej qani ħijaʔ. ariŋ ɣipun lɣa makiʔ βalaj s~ɕqu laluʔ njaʔ la. piraʔ kawas~ɕ wajal, ana wal ħmor topa qs~ɕjaʔ, uluŋ makiʔ mmrħuw ru s~ɕexuʔ mjan ka klokaħ s~ɕms~ɕuŋ ru kβalej ɣiqas~ɕ na ppman taʔ. jas~ɕa qa tħuje s~ɕami mwaħ tβuʔ ulej laʔi. nanuʔ tmraŋ rjax ħŋawan ɣa, kħmej na s~ɕquliq mwaħ tβuʔ ulej. krumaʔ s~ɕquliq ħijaʔ ɣa, memaw maras~ɕ qeqajaʔ nħaʔ mwaħ pħapuj ru mʔaβiʔ s~ɕkaʔ turuj βiħ s~ɕjaw na ulej qani. ps~ɕljan laħuj na ɣaɣa ki ps~ɕlokaħ ħi ukaʔ ps~ɕljan laħuj na ɣaɣa ki ps~ɕlokaħ ħiʔ nħaʔ, ɣiwaj muħaʔ qalaŋ mknaʔi ms~ɕqun mʦ~ʨis~ɕal, iniʔ ɣa ms~ɕqun mqβaq ana nanuʔ.
